examples: To search room, this is a very high speed, but not be however amain .
She said that she had decided not to buy the house because it was on amain road.
Is Ilikena Lasarusa Talebula ... maineiiliken...amain...avalen...iveivak...abulaimaina...kulalakebalau (the Fijian "Botham"), the cricketer with the longest name?
